MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON DEC-24-2020 IN 206, PLAINTIFF 46 GEARY, LLC'S MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL. DANA ANDREOLI, ESQ. APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF VIA COURTCALL. CHRISTIAN FOOTE, ESQ. APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT VIA COURTCALL. THE COURT GRANTS PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL. THE TRIAL DATE OF 1/25/21 IS VACATED AND THE NEW TRIAL DATE IS 7/26/21 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206. ALL DISCOVERY WILL REMAIN OPEN UNTIL 30 DAYS BEFORE THE TRIAL DATE OF 7/26/21 THAT INCLUDES CCP 2034 EXPERT DISCOVERY AND MOTIONS. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT AND MS. ANDREOLI TO SERVE THE ORDER. PARTIES WAIVED NOTICE. JUDGE: SAMUEL K. FENG; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)

MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Dana Andreoli (415-421-3400) of Steyer Lowenthal Boodrookas Alvarez & Smith LLP for Plaintiff.
Christian Foote (415-984-8500) of Clark Hill LLP for and with Defendant.

THE PARTIES STIPULATE TO THE MATTER BEING DECIDED BY THE JUDGE PRO TEM. THE PARTIES AND THE JUDGE PRO TEM APPEARING REMOTELY AUTHORIZE THE CLERK TO SIGN THE FORMAL STIPULATION FORM ON THEIR BEHALF.

Hearing is held. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF 46 GEARY, LLC's Motion To Compel Defendants Further Responses To Discovery is taken under submission.
